reviews.review_title: Love the game play, just one problem
reviews.review_description: Love the game so far! There is just one issue so far in the main restaurant. The top fridge door keeps falling off randomly, causing you to have to put it back on before you can continue. Sometimes, it's hard to pick the fridge door back up from the ground while glitching.  .Please help!

THE MOST RECENT GAME UPDATE made me lose all of my progress. I can no longer access the italian or Japanese restaurant. The microwave has the wrong town on it and the levels are incorrect. Please fix. It is worse than before!!!!!

developer_response.body:
Please update to the latest version.
We have just published a new hotfix.
https://www.oculus.com/experiences/quest/developer-post/961549906123026/

reviews.review_description:
I exited and restarted but it won’t let me past the pouring on the pizza sauce. I tried to skip that part with y but skipped the whole tutorial and can’t get back to the tutorial. Trying to find the tutorial again.

Update:You have to put all the ingredients on the pizza. I had to figure out the rest with trial and error.

developer_response.body:
thanks for the update!
Please update to the latest version. We have released a patch.
https://oculus.com/experiences/quest/developer-post/615392284647117/

reviews.review_description: I’m happy play with friends is good
